languages.text: Также называемые "ремесленниками", артизаны — члены Культа Механикус, посвятившие себя проектированию машин и техники самого разнообразного назначения. Большинство из — мастера ортодоксального подхода, использующие проверенные компоненты в утвержденных конфигурациях. Работа прославленных мастеров-артизанов невероятно ценится полководцами Империума, и лидеры Астра Милитарум всегда стремятся привлечь их к участию в организации военных операций в разных уголках Империума.

Also known as "Constructors," Artisans are members of the Cult Mechanicus dedicated to designing machines and equipment for a wide variety of purposes. Most Artisans take an orthodox approach to their craft, using tried and tested components in approved configurations. The work of renowned Artisan craftsmen is highly prized by commanders in the Imperium, and Astra Militarum leaders are always eager to enlist them in organising military operations throughout the Imperium.
languages.original_text: Также называемые "ремесленниками", артизаны — члены Культа Механикус, посвятившие себя проектированию машин и техники самого разнообразного назначения. Большинство из — мастера ортодоксального подхода, использующие проверенные компоненты в утвержденных конфигурациях. Also known as "Constructors," Artisans are members of the Cult Mechanicus dedicated to designing machines and equipment for a wide variety of purposes. Most Artisans take an orthodox approach to their craft, using tried and tested components in approved configurations. The work of renowned Artisan craftsmen is highly prized by commanders in the Imperium, and Astra Militarum leaders are always eager to enlist them in organising military operations throughout the Imperium.

languages.text: Los artesanos, también conocidos como «constructores», son miembros del Culto Mechanicus dedicados a diseñar máquinas y equipo para toda clase de propósitos. La mayoría de artesanos emplea un enfoque ortodoxo con su labor, empleando componentes de eficacia demostrada en configuraciones aprobadas. La labor de los artesanos de mayor renombre es muy valiosa para los comandantes del Imperium, y los líderes del Astra Militarum siempre buscan reclutarlos al organizar operaciones militares en cualquier lugar.
languages.original_text: Also known as "Constructors," Artisans are members of the Cult Mechanicus dedicated to designing machines and equipment for a wide variety of purposes. Most Artisans take an orthodox approach to their craft, using tried and tested components in approved configurations. The work of renowned Artisan craftsmen is highly prized by commanders in the Imperium, and Astra Militarum leaders are always eager to enlist them in organising military operations throughout the Imperium.

La labor de los artesanos de mayor renombre es muy valiosa para los comandantes del Imperium, y los líderes del Astra Militarum siempre buscan reclutarlos al organizar operaciones militares en cualquier lugar.

languages.text: 匠人，也被称为“建造者”，是机械修会的一员，专门负责设计各种用途的机械与设备。大多数匠人都会遵循正统路线，只使用经过验证测试的部件，并按标准方案来组装。著名匠人的作品深受帝国指挥官的珍视，而星界军的领导们总是想要招募他们，来为整个帝国的军事行动提供组织支持。
languages.original_text: Also known as "Constructors," Artisans are members of the Cult Mechanicus dedicated to designing machines and equipment for a wide variety of purposes. Most Artisans take an orthodox approach to their craft, using tried and tested components in approved configurations. The work of renowned Artisan craftsmen is highly prized by commanders in the Imperium, and Astra Militarum leaders are always eager to enlist them in organising military operations throughout the Imperium.

traits.locale_text: 匠人，也被称为“建造者”，是机械修会的一员，专门负责设计各种用途的机械与设备。大多数匠人都会遵循正统路线，只使用经过验证测试的部件，并按标准方案来组装。著名匠人的作品深受帝国指挥官的珍视，而星界军的领导们总是想要招募他们，来为整个帝国的军事行动提供组织支持。

languages.text: Parfois surnommés « constructors », les artisans sont des adeptes du Culte Mechanicus qui se dévouent à la conception de machines et d'équipements en tous genres. La plupart des artisans ont une approche conservatrice de leur métier : ils utilisent des composants déjà testés et suivent des schémas éprouvés. Le travail des artisans de renom est très prisé par les commandants de l'Imperium, et les dirigeants de l'Astra Militarum sont toujours prompts à les recruter pour leurs opérations militaires à travers l'Imperium.
languages.original_text: Also known as "Constructors," Artisans are members of the Cult Mechanicus dedicated to designing machines and equipment for a wide variety of purposes. Most Artisans take an orthodox approach to their craft, using tried and tested components in approved configurations. The work of renowned Artisan craftsmen is highly prized by commanders in the Imperium, and Astra Militarum leaders are always eager to enlist them in organising military operations throughout the Imperium.

languages.text: "İnşaatçı" olarak da bilinen Zanaatkârlar, kendilerini çok çeşitli amaçlara yönelik makine ve ekipman tasarlamaya adamış Cult Mechanicus üyeleridir. Çoğu Zanaatkâr, denenmiş ve test edilmiş bileşenleri onaylı konfigürasyonlarda kullanarak sanatlarında geleneksel bir yaklaşım sergiler. Ünlü Zanaatkâr ustalarının çalışmaları, İmparatorluk komutanlarınca büyük rağbet görür ve Astra Militarum önderleri, İmparatorluk'un dört yanında askerî operasyon tertiplerken onları da ekibe katmaya her daim can atar.
languages.original_text: Also known as "Constructors," Artisans are members of the Cult Mechanicus dedicated to designing machines and equipment for a wide variety of purposes. Most Artisans take an orthodox approach to their craft, using tried and tested components in approved configurations. The work of renowned Artisan craftsmen is highly prized by commanders in the Imperium, and Astra Militarum leaders are always eager to enlist them in organising military operations throughout the Imperium.

languages.text: 「コンストラクター」とも呼ばれるアーティザンは、機械や装備を幅広い用途のために設計する、機械神教の信者です。ほとんどのアーティザンは、伝統的な方法で職務に当たっており、試行錯誤を重ねて確立された部品を承認された構成で用います。名高いアーティザン職人の作品は、帝国の指揮官に高く評価されており、帝国軍の指導者たちは、常に彼らを帝国全域の軍事作戦の組織化に引き入れることに熱心です。
languages.original_text: Also known as "Constructors," Artisans are members of the Cult Mechanicus dedicated to designing machines and equipment for a wide variety of purposes. Most Artisans take an orthodox approach to their craft, using tried and tested components in approved configurations. The work of renowned Artisan craftsmen is highly prized by commanders in the Imperium, and Astra Militarum leaders are always eager to enlist them in organising military operations throughout the Imperium.

languages.text: Die auch als 'Konstruktoren' bekannten Artifexe sind Mitglieder des Kult Mechanicus, die sich dem Bau von Maschinen für verschiedene Zwecke widmen. Die meisten Artifexe verfolgen hinsichtlich ihrer Arbeit einen orthodoxen Ansatz und setzen erprobte und bewährte Komponenten in anerkannten Konfigurationen ein. Die Arbeit anerkannter Artifexe wird von Kommandeuren des Imperiums sehr geschätzt und Anführer des Astra Militarum rekrutieren sie gerne für die Organisation militärischer Operationen in verschiedenen Teilen des Imperiums.
